scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec "npm run build && node dist/app.js"
scripts.dev:macos: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd /Users/xxx/matterbridge-roborock-vacuum-plugin/webui && npm run dev"'
scripts.copy-src: cd src && rm -rf ext && cd .. && cpx '../src/**/*.!(json)' src/ext/
